chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 319 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.2710/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For hearing of main case. 18.10.2024 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for the Applicant >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the applicant, under instructions does not press the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
